title: Fresh Mowzie's Mobs textures
description: A new look at the Mowzie's mobs
body:
Spice up your adventure with Mowzie's mobs new looks! Resource pack currently includes next updated textures:
1. Frostmaw
2. Foliaath and its baby
3. Both variants of grottol
4. Naga
5. Ferrous Wroughtnaut
6. Lantern
Soon will be more!
Big thanks to Bob Mowzie for giving an opportunity to make his resource pack and providing models for it.

Join Discord of Mowzie's mobs and Team Obsidian, im the leading artist of the team, and we make different projects in there for our beloved game.

Mowzie's mobs Discord: https://discord.gg/yYVxAePV
Team Obsidian Discord: https://discord.gg/mTu3yx6B
